questions.question: Describe an example of a Nash equilibrium in a classic game, and explain why it is a stable outcome.
What are the key characteristics of a Nash equilibrium, and provide an example of a situation where this concept is relevant?
questions.hint: Focus on the concepts of rational choice and mixed strategies

questions.question: Compare and contrast the concept of a Nash equilibrium with the concept of a Pareto optimality. Provide an example of a situation where one is not the same as the other.
questions.hint: Consider the classic game of the Ultimatum Game
